Board.description: Erstelle individuelle Schachkonfigurationen. Ziehe an den Rändern zum Vergrößern, klicke zum Umschalten von Feldern.

HexGuide.title: Hexagonal-Anleitung
HexGuide.generalDesc: Auf einem hexagonalen Gitter bewegen sich Figuren entlang von 3 Hauptachsen (6 Richtungen) statt 2.
HexGuide.pawnDesc: Zieht 1 Hex vorwärts. Schlägt auf die 2 diagonal vorwärts liegenden Hexfelder (gleiche Farbe).
HexGuide.rookDesc: Zieht beliebig weit in 6 orthogonale Richtungen (durch Hex-Seiten).
HexGuide.bishopDesc: Zieht beliebig weit in 6 diagonale Richtungen (durch Hex-Ecken).
HexGuide.knightDesc: L-Form: 2 Schritte orthogonal, dann 1 Schritt 60° (springt über andere).
HexGuide.kingDesc: 1 Schritt in eine beliebige der 12 Richtungen (6 orthogonal + 6 diagonal).
HexGuide.queenDesc: Kombiniert Turm- und Läuferbewegung (12 Richtungen insgesamt).
HexGuide.note: Hinweis: Dieser Editor folgt der Logik axialer Koordinaten. Die tatsächliche Bewegung hängt von deiner eigenen Logik oder der gewählten Variante ab (z.B. Glinski vs McCooey).

Play.kingWarning: Platziere beide Könige auf dem Brett, um die Zugvalidierung zu aktivieren
Play.title: Play Yourself

Piece.title: Entwirf deine <accent>Schachfiguren</accent>
Piece.description: Erstelle pixelgenaue Schachfiguren mit unserem intuitiven 64x64 Editor.
Piece.confirmInvert: Das Invertieren der Farben überschreibt das aktuelle Design. Fortfahren?
Piece.pieceEditorBetaMessage: Der Figuren-Editor befindet sich aktuell in der Beta-Phase und ist nur für ausgewählte Ersteller verfügbar. Wir arbeiten hart daran, pixelgenaue Anpassung für alle zu ermöglichen!
Piece.visualLogicDescription: Definiere, wie deine Figur zieht, indem du Blöcke zusammenziehst.

diffX.label: Horizontal Step
diffX.desc: Die Anzahl der Felder, die die Figur horizontal zieht. Positiv ist rechts, negativ ist links.

diffY.label: Vertical Step
diffY.desc: Die Anzahl der Felder, die die Figur vertikal zieht. Positiv ist vorwärts, negativ ist rückwärts.

absDiffX.label: Horizontal Distance
absDiffX.desc: Der absolute horizontale Abstand, unabhängig von links oder rechts.

absDiffY.label: Vertical Distance
absDiffY.desc: Der absolute vertikale Abstand, unabhängig von vorwärts oder rückwärts.

descriptions.cooldown: Wendet eine Abklingzeit auf die Figur an.
descriptions.transformation: Verwandelt die Figur in einen anderen Typ.
descriptions.kill: Entfernt die Figur sofort aus dem Spiel.
descriptions.win: Beendet das Spiel sofort mit einem Sieg für den Besitzer dieser Figur.
descriptions.explode: Entfernt Figuren in einem Umkreis um diese Figur.

PrivacyPolicy.title: Datenschutzerklärung (DSGVO)
PrivacyPolicy.controllerText:
Verantwortlich für die Daten verarbeitung auf dieser Website ist:

Lasse Thoroe - Chessperiment
Adresse: Ahlerfeld 29, 38527 Meine, Deutschland
E-Mail: contact.chessperiment@gmail.com

Website: https://chessperiment.org
PrivacyPolicy.generalText: Der Schutz Ihrer Daten ist uns wichtig. Wir verarbeiten personenbezogene Daten nur, wenn es für die Bereitstellung unserer Dienste erforderlich ist und halten uns an die Datenschutz-Grundverordnung (DSGVO).
PrivacyPolicy.accountsText: Wenn Sie ein Konto erstellen, speichern wir Ihren Namen, Ihre E-Mail-Adresse und Ihr Profilbild. Diese Daten sind nicht öffentlich und dienen der Plattformfunktionalität. Rechtsgrundlage: Art. 6 Abs. 1 lit. b DSGVO.
PrivacyPolicy.contentText: Wir speichern von Ihnen erstellte Inhalte wie Schachbretter und Figuren. Je nach Ihren Einstellungen können diese öffentlich sichtbar sein. Rechtsgrundlage: Art. 6 Abs. 1 lit. b DSGVO.
PrivacyPolicy.chatText: Chat-Nachrichten werden gespeichert und auf verbotene Wörter gefiltert, um die Sicherheit zu gewährleisten. Rechtsgrundlage: Art. 6 Abs. 1 lit. f DSGVO.
PrivacyPolicy.analyticsText: Wir nutzen Vercel Analytics und Speed Insights, um die Leistung unserer Website zu messen. Diese Dienste sind datenschutzfreundlich, verwenden keine Cookies und erheben keine personenbezogenen Daten. Es werden anonyme Nutzungsstatistiken wie besuchte Seiten und Ladezeiten erfasst. Rechtsgrundlage: Art. 6 Abs. 1 lit. f DSGVO.
PrivacyPolicy.hostingText: Wir verwenden Google Firebase (Firestore) als Datenbank. Ihre Daten (Nutzerkonten, Spielverläufe, erstellte Inhalte) werden dort gespeichert. Daten können in den USA verarbeitet werden. Google ist nach dem EU-US Data Privacy Framework zertifiziert. Rechtsgrundlage: Art. 6 Abs. 1 lit. b DSGVO.
PrivacyPolicy.cookiesText: Wir verwenden keine Cookies für Tracking oder Werbung. Einzig ein technisch notwendiger Sitzungs-Cookie (JWT) wird beim Login gesetzt, um Ihre Sitzung aufrechtzuerhalten. Dieser Cookie ist für die Funktion der Website unerlässlich. Rechtsgrundlage: Art. 6 Abs. 1 lit. b DSGVO.
PrivacyPolicy.retentionText: Wir speichern Ihre Daten, solange Sie ein Konto bei uns haben. Spielverläufe und erstellte Inhalte werden länger gespeichert, um die Plattformintegrität zu wahren. Sie können die Löschung Ihres Kontos und der damit verbundenen personenbezogenen Daten jederzeit beantragen.
PrivacyPolicy.minorsText: Personen unter 16 Jahren sollten unsere Dienste nur mit Zustimmung der Eltern nutzen.
PrivacyPolicy.rightsText: Sie haben das Recht auf Auskunft, Berichtigung, Löschung, Einschränkung und Datenübertragbarkeit. Bitte kontaktieren Sie uns unter der oben angegebenen E-Mail-Adresse.
PrivacyPolicy.complaintText: Sie haben das Recht, eine Beschwerde bei einer Datenschutzaufsichtsbehörde einzureichen.
PrivacyPolicy.changesText: Wir können diese Datenschutzerklärung anpassen. Es gilt die jeweils aktuelle Fassung.

About.title: About Chessperiment — Free Chess Variant Creator & Abstract Strategy Game Engine
About.description: Chessperiment is not a template library — it's real customization. A free, browser-based game design engine for creating custom chess variants and abstract strategy games. Compare Chessperiment with Chess Remix, ChessCraft, Tabletop Simulator, and PyChess.

Feedback.title: Feedback
Feedback.description: Share your feedback, report bugs, or suggest new features for Chessperiment

Marketplace.title: Chessperiment Marketplace | Download Custom Chess Sets
Marketplace.description: Browse and download community-created chess boards and piece sets. Enhance your game with unique designs.

seoContent.heading: Discover and share custom chess assets
seoContent.text: The Chessperiment Marketplace is your central hub for community-created chess variants and abstract strategy games. Browse and download custom piece sets featuring fairy chess pieces, leapers, and riders with unique movement logic. Discover hexagonal chess boards, custom-shaped playing fields, and complete variant rule sets — every creation built with real customization, not just templates. All community creations are free to download and play.

Footer.title: Frequently Asked Questions
Footer.whatIsChessperimentAnswer: Chessperiment is a free, browser-based game design engine for creating custom chess variants and abstract strategy games — now with an AI variant generator. Describe your game idea in plain language, and the AI creates the full variant instantly for you. You bring the creativity; the AI handles the implementation.
Footer.canAIBuildVariant: Can AI build a chess variant for me?
Footer.canAIBuildVariantAnswer: Yes. Chessperiment has a built-in AI assistant that generates complete chess variants from simple descriptions. Just describe your idea — for example, 'chess where pawns explode when captured' — and the AI instantly configures the boards, pieces, and rules for you. You can then adjust the result in the visual editor however you like.
Footer.isItFreeAnswer: Yes. Chessperiment is completely free — no paywalls, no premium tiers, no ads. All features — including the piece editor, board editor, multiplayer, and marketplace — are free to use.
Footer.canIPlayFriendsAnswer: Yes. Create a room and share the code or link. Your friend joins in the browser — no account or installation needed.
Footer.whatIsLeaper: What is a leaper in chess?
Footer.whatIsLeaperAnswer: A leaper is a chess piece that moves to a fixed offset from its current square, regardless of what pieces are in between. The standard knight is a leaper. Chessperiment's piece editor lets you define any leaper pattern using a visual grid.
Footer.whatIsRider: What is a rider in chess?
Footer.whatIsRiderAnswer: A rider is a chess piece that slides along a vector until blocked or reaching the board edge. Rooks, bishops, and queens are all riders. Chessperiment lets you define custom rider directions.
Footer.whatIsFairyPiece: What is a fairy chess piece?
Footer.whatIsFairyPieceAnswer: A fairy chess piece is any non-standard piece used in chess variants. Common examples include the amazon (queen + knight), the camel (3,1-leaper), and the nightrider (rider along knight directions). Chessperiment's piece editor supports the full spectrum of fairy piece definitions.
Footer.canCreateHexBoards: Can I create hexagonal chess boards?
Footer.canCreateHexBoardsAnswer: Yes. Chessperiment's board editor supports full hexagonal board generation, letting you design hex chess variants and other hexagonal abstract strategy games.
Footer.diffFromChessRemix: How is Chessperiment different from Chess Remix?
Footer.diffFromChessRemixAnswer: Chess Remix locks many creation features behind a paywall and offers preset customization options. Chessperiment provides deeper functionality — including leaper/rider definitions, conditional triggers, hexagonal boards, and square-specific rule overrides — completely free. No templates — real customization.
Footer.diffFromChessCraft: How is Chessperiment different from ChessCraft?
Footer.diffFromChessCraftAnswer: ChessCraft is a mobile app with predefined piece templates. Chessperiment runs in any browser without installation and offers a deeper logic system: a Scratch-style visual block editor with state-based conditional triggers and complex multi-move sequences. Full customization, no templates.
Footer.hasStockfishAnswer: Yes. Chessperiment integrates the Stockfish chess engine and applies it to custom game states — including non-standard board topologies, custom piece definitions, and variant win conditions.
Footer.canDesignNonChess: Can I design abstract strategy games that aren't chess?
Footer.canDesignNonChessAnswer: Yes. Although Chessperiment uses chess as a baseline, the board editor and piece logic system support the full space of combinatorial, perfect-information abstract strategy games — including connection games, territorial games, and entirely novel rule systems.
Footer.whatIsMarketplaceAnswer: The Marketplace is a community library where users publish and share their custom chess variants, piece sets, and board designs. All content is free to download and play.
Footer.builtBy: Built with great attention to detail for chess enthusiasts.

Home.title: Chessperiment — AI-Powered Chess Variant Creator & Abstract Strategy Game Engine
Home.description: Describe your game idea — the AI creates the variant instantly for you. You bring the creativity, AI handles the implementation. No templates, real customization. Define pieces with visual logic blocks, build hexagonal boards, create leapers, riders, and fairy chess pieces. Free, browser-based, no coding required.
Home.h1: Chessperiment — AI-Powered Chess Variant Creator and Abstract Strategy Game Engine
Home.p: Chessperiment is a free, browser-based sandbox for designing custom chess variants and abstract strategy games. Simply describe your game idea — our AI creates the full variant instantly for you. You have the creative vision, the AI skips the boring setup step. The result is a complete Chessperiment project you can adjust however you like in the editor. Create pieces with a Scratch-style visual logic editor — define leaper and rider movement patterns, add conditional triggers, and program complex fairy chess piece behaviors without any coding knowledge. Design hexagonal or custom-shaped boards and test instantly with friends via room codes. Stockfish analysis is built in and works with your own rules.

Game.title: Play Chess Variants Online - Multiplayer Chess Games
Game.description: Play innovative chess variants online with friends. Multiplayer chess with custom boards and pieces. Free to play, no download required.

seoContent.heading: Experience the Next Generation of Chess Variants
seoContent.text: Join the Chessperiment community and play unique chess variants online with friends or against our built-in Stockfish AI. Our platform lets you use custom boards and piece sets designed by creators from around the world. Whether you want to test new piece logic you just created, or play a match with standard rules on an irregular board — our smooth multiplayer experience has you covered. Start a private match by sharing a room code, or join the lobby to find other players. With real-time move validation and advanced engine analysis, Chessperiment provides a robust environment for both casual play and competitive testing of new game mechanics.

Editor.title: Project Editor | Custom Chessperiment
Editor.description: Manage your custom chess projects. Create unique battlefields, design piece sets, and organize your creations.

PieceEditor.title: Visual Chess Piece Editor — Define Leaper, Rider & Fairy Chess Piece Logic
PieceEditor.description: Define custom chess piece movements with visual logic blocks — no coding required. No templates — real customization. Create leapers, riders, and complex fairy chess pieces with conditional triggers, state-based capture rules, and multi-step move sequences.

SquareEditor.title: Square Rule Editor — Square-Specific Logic for Chess Variants
SquareEditor.description: Assign unique rules to individual board squares — create teleport squares, territory zones, promotion areas, or movement restrictions. Enables advanced chess variants including Fractal Chess.

BoardEditor.title: Chess Board Editor - Design Custom Boards
BoardEditor.description: Create your own chess board layouts. Customize dimensions, colors, and starting positions. Export or play directly.

seoContent.heading: Create and share custom chess boards
seoContent.text: With the Chessperiment board editor, design chess boards of any dimension — from compact 4x4 to expansive 14x14 grids or any custom size. Create full hexagonal boards for hex chess variants. Toggle individual squares to build non-rectangular shapes: rings, crosses, maps with internal obstacles, or any topology. Assign square-specific rule overrides to create territory zones, teleport squares, or restricted movement areas. These are not templates — this is real customization. Whether you're building a classic fairy chess variant, prototyping a Hex- or Y-style connection game, or designing an entirely new abstract strategy game from scratch — the board editor gives you full geometric control with no coding required.

Announcements.title: Chessperiment News & Announcements
Announcements.description: Stay up to date on the latest features, updates, and community news from Chessperiment.

Analyze.title: Analyze Chess Games with Stockfish
Analyze.description: Analyze your chess games with the powerful Stockfish engine. Improve your strategy and learn from your mistakes.

PrivacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy (GDPR)
PrivacyPolicy.description: Learn how Chessperiment processes your data. Our GDPR-compliant privacy policy covers user data, cookies, Firebase hosting, and your rights.
PrivacyPolicy.controllerText:
Responsible for data processing on this website:

Lasse Thoroe - Chessperiment
Address: Ahlerfeld 29, 38527 Meine, Germany
Email: contact.chessperiment@gmail.com

Website: https://chessperiment.app
PrivacyPolicy.generalText: The protection of your data is important to us. We only process personal data when it is necessary for providing our services and comply with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).
PrivacyPolicy.accountsText: When you create an account, we store your name, email address, and profile picture. This data is not public and serves platform functionality. Legal basis: Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR.
PrivacyPolicy.contentText: We store content you create such as chess boards and pieces. Depending on your settings, these may be publicly visible. Legal basis: Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR.
PrivacyPolicy.chatText: Chat messages are stored and filtered for prohibited words to ensure safety. Legal basis: Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR.
PrivacyPolicy.analyticsText: We use Vercel Analytics and Speed Insights to measure website performance. These services are privacy-friendly, use no cookies, and collect no personal data. Anonymous usage statistics such as visited pages and load times are recorded. Legal basis: Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR.
PrivacyPolicy.hostingText: We use Google Firebase (Firestore) as our database. Your data (user accounts, game histories, created content) is stored there. Data may be processed in the USA. Google is certified under the EU-US Data Privacy Framework. Legal basis: Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR.
PrivacyPolicy.cookiesText: We use no cookies for tracking or advertising. Only a technically necessary session cookie (JWT) is set on login to maintain your session. This cookie is essential for the website's functionality. Legal basis: Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR.
PrivacyPolicy.retentionText: We store your data for as long as you have an account with us. Game histories and created content are retained longer to preserve platform integrity. You may request deletion of your account and associated personal data at any time.
PrivacyPolicy.minorsText: Persons under 16 years of age should use our services only with parental consent.
PrivacyPolicy.rightsText: You have the right to access, rectification, erasure, restriction, and data portability. Please contact us at the email address provided above.
PrivacyPolicy.complaintText: You have the right to lodge a complaint with a data protection supervisory authority.
PrivacyPolicy.changesText: We may update this privacy policy. The current version applies at any time.
PrivacyPolicy.madeWith: Created with the kind support of

ProjectView.title: Project Overview | Custom Chessperiment
ProjectView.description: View and manage your chess project. Edit your board and pieces in one place.

PieceEditorFAQ.title: Piece Editor FAQ | Visual Scripting Help
PieceEditorFAQ.description: Learn how to use the piece editor, visual logic blocks, and movement rules. Detailed technical guide to creating custom chess pieces.

general.title: General
general.a1: The piece editor lets you create custom chess pieces with unique movement patterns and logic.
general.q2: How do I save my piece?
general.a2: Click the 'Save piece' button in the sidebar. Your piece will be saved in the current project.

moveEditor.title: Movement Editor
moveEditor.a1: Use the visual grid to click squares that the piece can move to relative to its position.
moveEditor.a2: Jumping moves allow the piece to leap over other pieces, like a knight.

logicEditor.title: Logic Editor
logicEditor.a1: It's a visual scripting environment where you can define complex behaviors using blocks.
logicEditor.a2: Triggers start a logic chain when a specific event occurs, such as 'onMove' or 'onCapture'.
logicEditor.a3: Yes, you can define and modify variables to create stateful pieces.
logicEditor.a4: You can move pieces, capture, create new ones, or modify game state variables.
logicEditor.a5: The 'explode' effect allows a piece to destroy all pieces within a certain radius. You can set the radius individually.

troubleshooting.title: Troubleshooting
troubleshooting.a1: Check that you have defined valid moves in the movement or logic editor.
troubleshooting.a2: Make sure your blocks are connected correctly and the trigger condition is met.

NotFound.title: 404 - Figur nicht gefunden
NotFound.description: Es scheint, als wäre dieser Zug ungültig. Die Seite, die du suchst, existiert nicht oder wurde verschoben.

About.title: Über Chessperiment
About.intro: Chessperiment (chessperiment.app) ist eine Web-Plattform, die sich der Erstellung hochgradig anpassbarer Schachvarianten widmet. Im Gegensatz zu herkömmlichen Schach-Webseiten ermöglicht Chessperiment den Nutzern, ihre eigenen einzigartigen Spiele zu entwerfen – mit voller Kontrolle über Bretter, Figuren, Regeln und Interaktionen.

customBoards.title: Benutzerdefinierte Bretter
customBoards.description: Erstelle Bretter in jeder Form und Größe, die deiner Vision entsprechen.

pieceEditor.title: Fortgeschrittener Figuren-Editor
pieceEditor.description: Designe Figuren mit einzigartigen Bewegungen und Fähigkeiten.

visualScripting.title: Visuelle Programmierung
visualScripting.description: Nutze Drag-and-Drop für Trigger, Effekte und Variablen – ähnlich wie in Scratch –, um komplexe Spielmechaniken ohne Programmierung zu erstellen.

variants.title: Nutzererstellte Varianten
variants.description: Experimentiere und spiele deine eigenen Schachvarianten oder probiere die Kreationen anderer aus.

mission.title: Unsere Mission
mission.description: Chessperiment existiert, um die Grenzen der Kreativität im Schach zu erweitern. Wir möchten jedem, vom Anfänger bis zum Fortgeschrittenen, die Möglichkeit geben, völlig neue Schacherlebnisse zu erfinden, zu teilen und zu spielen.

developer.title: Über den Entwickler
developer.description: Chessperiment wird von einem einzelnen Entwickler entwickelt, der auf Reddit und GitHub aktiv ist. Erst vor wenigen Wochen gestartet, hat die Plattform bereits über 100 Nutzer angezogen, die die endlosen Möglichkeiten des anpassbaren Schachs erkunden.

Feedback.subtitle: Helfen Sie uns, Chessperiment zu verbessern, indem Sie Ihre Gedanken teilen
